theorem_statement.name: RESTRICTED_COLLAPSE_GATE_THEOREM
theorem_statement.formal_statement: For every datum D in the restricted initial-data class, if D satisfies the restricted gate predicates, the restricted energy-condition interface, and the restricted wellposedness/continuation interface, then D admits a restricted collapse-gate trigger inside the declared restricted gate domain, with all no-promotion boundaries preserved.
premises: D remains inside the declared restricted gate domain

boundary: No gravity closure is claimed.
No collapse-gate theorem is claimed.
No restricted collapse-gate theorem is proved.
No unrestricted collapse-gate theorem is claimed.
No restricted collapse-gate theorem proof object is supplied.
No analytic gravity theorem is claimed.
No wellposedness theorem is claimed.
No energy condition theorem is claimed.
No four-dimensional collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted non-symmetric collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted cosmic censorship theorem is claimed.
No hoop conjecture result is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem is claimed.
No dark matter detection is claimed.
No dark matter resolution is claimed.
No DFM-MKC validation is claimed.
No Lambda-CDM failure is claimed.
No empirical validation is claimed.
No Clay problem is claimed.
does_not_prove: unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem
unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem
